p3_definition: P3 is the production bridge from Source Runtime to Playback-Ready Input System. P3 is not P2 continuation. P3 is not playback core, renderer, decoder, audio output, UI, player timeline, segment scheduler.
p3_input: P2 local_file runtime, P2 HTTP range runtime, P2 WebDAV range bridge
p3_output: Playback-ready input candidates for P4 (safe, low-latency, evidence-backed, cancellable, async, layered, rankable, runtime-revisable, secure handoff-ready)
stop_condition_check: No task names P3 work as a P2 child task
